promotions.label: RL for JITAI personalization
promotions.reason: Directly applicable methodology: RL algorithms specifically designed for personalization of digital JITAIs. Core to the project's aim of config-driven RL for JITAI decision-making.

promotions.label: JITAIs for PA: systematic review
promotions.reason: Core domain data and theoretical foundation: systematic review of JITAIs designed to promote physical activity, directly mapping to the project's physical activity intervention focus.

promotions.label: Context inference for JITAIs
promotions.reason: Implementation-relevant: examines impact of context inference error on RL for JITAIs. Directly relevant to the project's 36-state factored MDP with context variables (step_bin, sleep, day_of_week, burden).

promotions.label: JITAIs: key components (2018)
promotions.reason: Theoretical foundation: Nahum-Shani et al.'s seminal paper defining the key components and conceptual framework for JITAIs in mobile health. Foundational reference for the entire project domain.
